questions.question: A bag has 4 red and 6 blue balls. What is P(red)?
P(A) = 0.3, P(B) = 0.4, and A and B are independent. What is P(A and B)?
questions.explanation: For independent events: P(A and B) = P(A) × P(B) = 0.3 × 0.4 = 0.12.

questions.question: Two dice are rolled. What is P(sum = 7)?
What is P(at least one head in 3 coin flips)?
questions.explanation: Use complement: P(at least one head) = 1 − P(no heads) = 1 − (1/2)³ = 1 − 1/8 = 7/8.

questions.question: Drawing 2 cards without replacement from a standard deck. What is P(both are aces)?
P(A) = 0.5 and P(A and B) = 0.2. What is P(B|A)?
